title: F1 2026 Explained: New Rules, New Engines  and a Possible Downfall? #automobile #f1technology
description:
The Formula 1 2026 regulations will launch a completely new era of F1. New engine rules, major aerodynamic changes, sustainable fuel innovations, and a potential shake-up of the competitive order.

But will this revolution bring closer racing and new legends… or create another era of domination and unexpected downfall?

In this video we break down:

The new F1 2026 technical regulations

The new power unit changes and hybrid system

Which teams could dominate

Which teams are at serious risk
#au

title: Bahrain F1 Pre-Season Testing Explained — What We Actually Learned
description:
Bahrain pre-season testing is over — but the lap times didn’t tell the real story.

Behind the calm headlines and misleading timesheets, teams revealed far more than they wanted to. Confidence issues, hidden pace, early struggles, and subtle signs of who understands the new regulations… and who doesn’t.

In this video, we break down what actually mattered during Bahrain testing:
• Which teams looked comfortable
• Who might be hiding performance
• Where the early cracks are appearing

title: Ferrari 2026 Engine Fire-Up Explained | Lewis Hamilton, New Rules & F1’s Electric Future
description:
The first fire-up of Ferrari’s 2026 Formula 1 engine wasn’t just a technical milestone — it was a message to the entire grid. After months of doubts, delays, and speculation, this moment confirms Ferrari is no longer reacting to the new era. They are shaping it.

title: 2025 F1 ABU DHABI GP Qualifying analysis by Peter Windsor
description: It's Max Verstappen and Red Bull-Honda on the pole for the season's finale, with McLaren-Mercedes P2-P3 (Lando Norris, Oscar Piastri). Max was superquick on used tyres in Q2 before parlaying that speed into two brilliant pole laps. All three drivers could emerge from Sunday's race as the 2025 World Champion but the odds favour Norris: he has only to finish third to clinch the title, regardless of where the others are placed.
